name: Town Pump - Deer Lodge

name: Town Pump / Pilot #908
description: Large 24-hour Pilot-branded Town Pump travel center at the Rocker interchange on the I-90/I-15 concurrency west of Butte, with 12 diesel lanes, 10 showers, CAT scale and multiple fast-food outlets.

name: Town Pump / Pilot #910 - Three Forks
description: Pilot-branded Town Pump travel center at I-90 Exit 274 (US-287) with roughly 90 parking spaces, 9 fuel lanes, 7 showers and a CAT scale.

name: Town Pump / Pilot #1013 - Belgrade
description: 24-hour Pilot-branded Town Pump travel center at I-90 Exit 298 in Belgrade with 9 fuel lanes, 5 showers, laundry and a CAT scale.

name: Flying J Travel Plaza - Belgrade
description: Broadway-operated Flying J travel plaza at I-90 Exit 298 with about 125 truck parking spaces, 6 diesel lanes, showers, laundry and the Broadway Diner.

name: Town Pump Truck Stop - Bozeman
description: Town Pump truck stop serving I-90 traffic in Bozeman, listed in commercial truck-stop directories (exact street address unverified).

name: Town Pump (Conoco) - Livingston

name: Butte (Rocker) Port of Entry / Weigh Station

name: Pomp's Tire Service - Butte
description: Commercial, farm and OTR tire dealer in Butte offering 24-hour roadside tire service for trucks along the I-90/I-15 corridor.

name: Pomp's Tire Service - Bozeman
description: Commercial, farm and OTR tire dealer in Bozeman offering 24-hour roadside truck tire service along the I-90 corridor.

name: MCM Truck Repair

name: Carriage House Car Wash (semi/RV bay)
description: 24/7 Bozeman wash with a 14-foot-clearance bay that accommodates semis, RVs and oversized vehicles, offering fleet accounts (exact street address unverified).

name: Super 8 Big Timber (at Town Pump #922)
description: Super 8 motel co-located with the Town Pump #922 truck stop at I-90 Exit 367, adjacent to truck parking and the Country Skillet restaurant.
